## Checklist

- [ ] Section renders correctly on mobile
- [ ] All content is editable via Theme Editor
- [ ] Code follows BEM / consistent naming
- [ ] No hardcoded text or images
- [ ] Accessible (aria labels, alt text, keyboard nav)
